kw.name: API Login And Get Token And ID
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "driver", "password": "Admin1234!"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: GET
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/vehicles path_url=/api/vehicles headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11bHdiM3QwMDAwcXA2bTdmMjZvdnRzIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc1NDQ3NCwiZXhwIjoxNzczODQwODc0fQ.ctO5eGg8wIHKmju4J5u5fgudFNTxs7JDywGgMs7dNy0'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request.

kw.name: POST
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/routes path_url=/api/routes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11bHdiM3QwMDAwcXA2bTdmMjZvdnRzIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc1NDQ3NCwiZXhwIjoxNzczODQwODc0fQ.ctO5eGg8wIHKmju4J5u5fgudFNTxs7JDywGgMs7dNy0', 'Content-Length': '337', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"vehicleId": "cmmulwb7b0005qp6ma41tem7z", "startLocation": {"lat": 13.7563, "lng": 100.5018, "address": "Pickup Point"}, "endLocation": {"lat": 13.746, "lng": 100.5231, "address": "Dropoff Point"}, "departureTime": "2026-03-17T13:39:34.140372Z", "availableSeats": 1, "pricePerSeat": 150, "routeSummary": "Test route for reporting flow"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.

kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/bookings path_url=/api/bookings headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.3', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW11bHdiNTUwMDAxcXA2bWZyY2l6bTBjIiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImlhdCI6MTc3Mzc1NDQ3NCwiZXhwIjoxNzczODQwODc0fQ.t_9_yTSKwGcfcxX5ZDCXR4rs_2QeuwIdnv9lBui5wQY', 'Content-Length': '221', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"routeId": "cmmunm7qc0015se2elps3nhkc", "numberOfSeats": 1, "pickupLocation": {"lat": 13.7563, "lng": 100.5018, "address": "Pickup Point"}, "dropoffLocation": {"lat": 13.746, "lng": 100.5231, "address": "Dropoff Point"}}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request.
